name: Raw spring cost add-on revision
description: Synthetic quote revision where Chris gives raw internal spring cost. Should update repair field and cost breakdown, not only sell price.

thread.subject: RE: QU-0605 Game Chairs spring replacement

messages.body: Revise existing quote QU-0605 for the 4 game chairs. Add spring replacement. $140 per chair is what it costs me, raw internal cost.
